title: celosia schinzii
intro: Celosia schinzii, also known as the woolflower or woolly celosia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaranthaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Celosia schinzii include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Celosia schinzii can be made into a tea or infused in oil to utilize its medicinal properties.
